goal: Initialize and build the Next.js Pages Router frontend with all required pages, API integration, and auth state.
summary: Frontend Build phase complete. Initialized Next.js Pages Router project with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS. Created API utility (lib/api.ts), shared Layout with auth-aware navigation, and all pages: Home (shorten), Login, Register, Dashboard, Analytics. Added GET /shorten backend endpoint for dashboard listing. Frontend build succeeds with static generation for all pages.
stepSummaries:
1. Initialize Next.js project in frontend/ with Pages Router, TypeScript, Tailwind [verified]
  2. Create API utility for backend calls with credentials: include and JSON headers [verified]
  3. Build pages: index (shorten), login, register, dashboard, analytics/[short_code] [verified]
  4. Add shared layout with navigation and auth-aware links [verified]
  5. Build Next.js frontend [verified]
